messages.content: 用地道的英语翻译“如图1所示，在d维度空间R^d中，给定的n个样本点组成集合{x_i }，每一个样本点为一个向量，其中i=1,2,…,n。”
As shown in Figure 1, in the d-dimensional space R^d, given a set of n samples points {x_i}, where each sample point is a vector, with i ranging from 1 to n.
用地道的英语翻译“在空间R^d中任选一起始点x^0，计算起始点x^0到势力范围S_k内每一个点x_i的偏移量x_i-x^0，对所有偏移量求和再求平均，得到平均偏移量，即MeanShift向量。”

Choose an initial point x^0 in the space R^d, calculate the displacement x_i-x^0 for each point x_i within the influence domain S_k, and then take the sum of all displacements and calculate the average to obtain the mean displacement, known as the MeanShift vector.
用地道的英语翻译“MeanShift向量表示该起始点到下一中心点的漂移方向与漂移值，其计算公式如下”
The MeanShift vector represents the direction and magnitude of the shift from the initial point to the next centroid. Its calculation formula is as follows.
用地道的英语翻译“用地道的英语翻译“MeanShift向量表示该起始点到下一中心点的漂移方向与漂移值，其计算公式如下”
The MeanShift vector represents the direction and magnitude of the shift from the initial point to the next centroid. The calculation formula is as follows.
用地道的英语翻译“公式中，S_k是半径为H的高维球面区域，是MeanShift向量每次计算的势力范围，它是由满足以下的关系y组成的集合：”

In the formula, S_k represents a high-dimensional spherical region with a radius of H. It is the influence domain where the MeanShift vector is computed. It is defined as the set of points y that satisfy the following criteria:
用地道的英语翻译“公式（3-6）中，K代表在n个采样点中，其中有K个点属于S_k区域。平均偏移量M_h (x)表示为概率密度梯度的方向。该算法的目标是沿着平均偏移量M_h (x)的方向进行反复迭代，直到找到采样点密度最高的区域。因为初始采样点x的选择对M_h (x)的最终结果有很大影响。因此，常使用核函数表示样本点的权重系数以及样本点的距离对均值漂移计算的影响，公式如下：”

In equations (3-6), K represents the number of points among the n sampled points that belong to the S_k region. The average shift M_h(x) is calculated as the direction of the probability density gradient. The objective of this algorithm is to iteratively move along the direction of the average shift M_h(x) until the region with the highest sample density is found. The initial choice of the sampled point x has a significant impact on the final result of M_h(x). Therefore, a kernel function is commonly used to represent the weight coefficients of the sampled points and the influence of the distances between the sampled points on the mean shift calculation. The formula is as follows:
用地道的英语翻译“式子G_H (x)是核函数。H是带宽矩阵，即d×d正定矩阵。在实际应用中，矩阵通常是对角矩阵，公式如下：”

The expression G_H(x) represents the kernel function. H is the bandwidth matrix, which is a positive definite d×d matrix. In practical applications, the matrix is often a diagonal matrix. The formula is as follows:
用地道的英语翻译“MeanShift向量的方向是点x处的核密度估计梯度的方向。因为梯度总是指向密度方向变化最大的方向，所以MeanShift向量最终将收敛到密度分布的峰值。因此将模锻件每个单元的不同方向的应力值作为一个样本，所有单元应力值的集合组成单元应力数据集，使用MeanShift算法对单元应力数据集聚类，从而将模锻件残余应力场划分为有限个组别，减小残余应力场待求解参数的规模。”

The direction of the MeanShift vector corresponds to the gradient of the kernel density estimation at point x. As the gradient always points in the direction of the maximum density variation, the MeanShift vector will eventually converge to the peak of the density distribution. Therefore, by treating the stress values in different directions of each element as samples and creating a dataset of stress values for all elements, the MeanShift algorithm can be used to cluster the data, thereby partitioning the residual stress field of the forging into a finite number of groups. This helps reduce the size of the parameters to be solved for in the residual stress field.
用地道的英语翻译“针对模锻件残余应力场的推断的问题，本文将模锻件每个单元作为一个样本，并考虑3个主方向上的应力，即问题空间为3维度空间R^3。本文使用MeanShift算法对单元应力数据集聚类，从而将模锻件残余应力场划分为有限个组别，减小残余应力场待求解参数的规模。”

In addressing the problem of inferring the residual stress field of a forging, this paper treats each element of the forging as a sample and considers the stress values in three principal directions, thus defining the problem space as a 3-dimensional space R^3. The MeanShift algorithm is employed in this study to cluster the dataset of element stress values, thereby partitioning the residual stress field of the forging into a finite number of groups and reducing the dimensionality of the parameters to be solved for in the residual stress field.
